one_line: Ran harness_synth on A8-certified-novel incidents only (10 train/5 held-out, generalizable hazard spans both); synthesized rules generalize to held-out novel incidents at 94.1% acc / 5.9% false-allow vs human 95.6%/8.8%, stable over 2 runs; gpt-5.5 operator (Anthropic credits out); 2 structural held-out misses (leak_restart/trap_action unexpressible in 6-feature language); no core files edited.
